case_title: BAY AREA BUSINESS DEVELOPMENT COMPANY VS SINDELAR RUDI

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $600.00 FILED BY BAY AREA BUSINESS DEVELOPMENT COMPANY AS TO DEFENDANT SINDELAR RUDI ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-03-1991 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 02
